product: AI strategy consulting, personal brand content, and AI education — helping founders and companies understand and apply AI
brand_brief: ASKGauravAI is Gaurav Khanna's AI strategy brand — combining personal brand content, AI education for founders, and a behind-the-scenes DM outreach strategy targeting companies and managers looking to hire an AI strategist. Competitors to track and differentiate from: @manthanjethwani, @aiwithanushka, @shivam.ai.data. Style and ambition references (not competitors): @garyvee (volume + raw founder energy), @vaibhavsisinty (Indian founder personal brand scale).
target_audience: D2C founders, solopreneurs, agency owners, and aspiring AI users who want to apply AI in their businesses. Hidden strategy: managers and companies looking to hire an AI strategist.
tone_specifics: Straight-talking but makes complex AI simple to understand. Founder-to-founder energy. No fluff. Teach through examples, not theory.
what_to_never_say: Never pitch the hiring/consulting angle in public content. Never use jargon-heavy AI buzzwords without explaining them. Never sound like a generic 'AI guru'.
